hero.tagline: Katale ka Balimi ba East Africa
hero.headline: Emboga Empya Okuva Mu Kibanja — Ezikutusiza
hero.subtitle: Yunga ne balimi mu Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, ne Rwanda. Okuva mu kibanja kitono ennyo okutuuka ku mmwawa enene — ShambaNi kileeta katale eri buli omulimi.

categories.title: Emboga Empya Ewereddwa Kati
categories.subtitle: Okuva mu Balimi ba East Africa

howItWorks.title: Yangu. Mangu. Kirungi.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Omulimi yenna ayinza okuwandiisa ku yintaneti oba okubaka *220# ku ssimu yonna — tetaagisa ssimu ya smartphone. Wandiisa ebikoola byo mu katono, teka omutengo gwo, era tuuka ku abagula ba kijjulo.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Amasomero, bizinensi, n'amaka galambula emboga empya ne basaba obuguzi butereevu ne balimi. Yerabira ku district, category, oba omutengo.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Omulimi alamba okuleetera. Ssula mu ngeri entuufu okuyita mu Airtel Money, MTN Mobile Money, PayPal, oba Bank Transfer. Musolo gw'ensi 2.5% gyokka — ekirala kigenda butereevu eri omulimi.

ussd.title: Tossa Smartphone? Tewali Wazzewo!
ussd.description: Dyaaya *220# ku ssimu yonna okuwandiisa ebikoola byo, okulaba order zo, n'okufuna ssente — ne ku ssimu ya kikadde.
ussd.feature2: Funa SMS ebigambo nga order zituuse
ussd.feature4: Kiwereere mu Lungeleza, Luganda, Kiswahili ne Runyarwanda

crossBorder.title: Okuva mu Uganda Kugenda mu East Africa
crossBorder.description: ShambaNi yatandika mu Uganda, naye okulaba kwaffe kwatuse mu East Africa yonna. Tuzimba ennyungu z'abantu ne balimi n'abagula mu nsi nnya, nga tuvunula emizinga n'omutimbagano ogukola ku ssimu yonna.

payments.title: Ssula Engeri Yo — Okufuga mu Ngeri Entuufu
payments.airtelDesc: Okusasula okumangu okuyita mu ssimu mu East Africa yonna. Kiwereere mu Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, ne Rwanda.
payments.mtnDesc: Ekifo ekinene ennyo eky'okusasula mu Uganda. Okusasula okumangu, tetaagisa akawunti ya banki.
payments.paypalDesc: Okusasula okw'ensi yonna okukozesa PayPal. Akawunti: @LutwamaReagan. Okukuuma owegula kwereddwa.
payments.bankDesc: Okusasula okugenda butereevu ku banki ez'enene mu East Africa zonna.
payments.feeNotice: Musolo gw'ensi 2.5% gyokka — omutofo ku kitundu. Ekirala kigenda butereevu eri balimi baffe.

testimonials.title: Eby'amazima Okuva mu Balimi n'Abagula
testimonials.quote1: Oluvannyuma lw'e ShambaNi nandiba nga nkubula kabbaagi ennyingi. Kaakati ntunda byonna! Mwezi guwedde nfunye UGX 180,000 okuva mu kibanja kyange ekitono. Enkola eno kyeyawadde obulamu bwange.
testimonials.quote2: Tugula ennyanya ne matooke butereevu okuva mu balimi. Emboga empya, emitengo egisu, era tumanyi gyegiturira. Abayizi baffe balya obulungi olw'e ShambaNi.
testimonials.role2: Omufulumya wa Canteen ya Somero, Wakiso
testimonials.quote3: Ssina smartphone naye mbuuka *220# okuwandiisa obwaku bwange. Nfunye order 3 mu mmwezi guno! Wadde nga ssi na yintaneti, nsobola okutunda emboga zange.

cta.title: Weteefu Okwegatta ku Katale ka Balimi ba East Africa?
cta.subtitle: Oba oli mulimi ayagala okutunda oba owegula ayagala emboga empya — ShambaNi kikukuuma.

footer.tagline: Okusitula abalimi ba East Africa — okuva mu kibanja kitono okutuuka ku kinene.
footer.copyright: 2026 ShambaNi. Okusitula Abalimi ba East Africa.

product.head: mutwe
product.deliveryInfo: Okuleetera kuli mu district. Yamba omulimu okupanga.
product.farmerBio: Omulimi ow'obuvumu n'obukugu obw'emyaka emingi mu kulima ebikoola ebirungi. Ayakulira ennono z'okulima ebikolebwa ebinywani era aweereza ebikoola ebisusse n'ebilamu abaguzi kumawanga ga East Africa.

browse.title: Akatale ke'Emboga Empya
browse.subtitle: Nona emboga empya nyingi eziva mu balimi abakakasiddwa mu bitundu byonna
browse.noResultsDesc: Gezaako okukyusa okunoonya kwo oba okusengejja okuzuula kye onoonya.

cart.title: Akatako Ko
cart.subtitle: Kebera ebintu byo nga tonnagula
cart.emptyDescription: Lambula akatale kaffe okuzuula emboga empya eva mu balimi.
cart.airtelDesc: Sasula nga okozesa Airtel Money. Ojja kufuna obubaka ku ssimu yo okukakasa.
cart.mtnDesc: Sasula nga okozesa MTN Mobile Money. Okukakasa kujja mangu.
cart.bankDesc: Sasula okuyita mu banki. Ekibalibwa kikolebwa okuva mu ssente eziriddwa.
cart.terms: Nze nkiriza amateeka ne nkakasa nti ebinkwatako biri mu mazima.
cart.successMessage: Webale nnyo ku by'ogula! Omulimi alabiddwa era ajja kukwatagana naawe okupanga okutwalibwa. Ojja kufuna obubaka bwa SMS ku mbeera y'ebigula.

farmerRegister.title: Wandiisa Ekibanja Kyo
farmerRegister.pageSubtitle: Tandika okutunda ebikulimibwa ku baguzi bangi okuva East Africa. Okwewandiisa tebayiringa nsobola okumala eddakiika mukaaga zokka.
farmerRegister.phoneNote: Ennamba eno ejja kukozesebwa mu USSD ne mu bubaka obw'okujjukiza
farmerRegister.farmAboutPlaceholder: Tunnyonyole ensuku yo, ekikulimibwa, obumanyirivu bwo...
farmerRegister.paymentInfoNote: Ensasula zonna zikolebwa ShambaNi. Ensasula zikuumibwa obukuumi okutuusa ebyoleeteddwa bituukiddwa, olwo ne zituusibwa gyoli nga tekubiddwako 2.5% ya ShambaNi.
farmerRegister.submitNote: Okusaba kwo kija kukeberwa mu bbanga lya saawa 24-48.
farmerRegister.successMessage: Webale okweyambisa ShambaNi. Ekibiina kyaffe kija kukebera okusaba kwo ne bakubuulira mu bbanga lya saawa 24-48. Mu kiseera kino, oyinza okutandika okulambula ebikulimibwa byo ng'ookyusa *220# ku simu yonna.

admin.feeDescription: Omusolo gunooguddwa ku buli kusasula. Omulimi afuna ezisigaddewo.
admin.paypalDescription: Elamba ya PayPal ekozesebwa okufuna ssente ez'ensi yonna.
admin.smsNotifications: Weerezza SMS eri abalimi ku order empya

ussdPage.heroDesc: Tolina kyetaagisa smartphone oba internet okutunda ku ShambaNi. Kuba koodo ku simu yo ey'obujjuvu oleete abaguzi okuva East Africa yonna.
ussdPage.step1Desc: Ggulawo akabba ku simu yo oyite *220#. Nyiga okuyita. Tewetaaga kudawunulodinga app yonna — ekikolera ku simu yonna, ne Nokia ey'edda.
ussdPage.step2Desc: Olukalala lulabika ku sikulini yo. Londa ky'oyagala kukola: okulambula ebikulimibwa, okukebera ebiragiddwa, oba okulaba ensimbi zo. Kozesa ennamba okulambula.
ussdPage.step3Desc: Omuguzi bw'atuuma ebyoleeteddwa, ofuna bubaka. Twala ebyokulima, ensasula eyitibwa mu Airtel Money, MTN Mobile Money, oba ku akaawunti ya banki.
ussdPage.smsMockup: Okulagiddwa okupya! Omuguzi ayagala ebbeeyi 5 za mayi. Kasenteme: UGX 57,500. Ddamu CONIFIRM okukkiriza.
ussdPage.exploreDesc: Nyiga ku bibuuzo okulaba kiki ky'osobola kukola ne USSD.
ussdPage.langDesc: USSD ya ShambaNi ekolera mu nnimi 4 za East Africa. Kyusa lulimi lyo mu kiseera kyonna.
ussdPage.sms1Content: Okulagiddwa okupya kufuniddwa! John M. ayagala kg 10 za nyanya okuva ku kibanja kyo. Ddamu CONIFIRM okukkiriza oba CANCEL okugaana. — ShambaNi
ussdPage.sms2Content: Ensimbi za UGX 35,000 ku kiragiddwa #1234 zituusiddwa ku Airtel Money yo. Weebale okukozesa ShambaNi!
ussdPage.sms3Content: Embeera z'omuwiikka eno: Nyanya UGX 3,500/kg (↑5%), Mayai UGX 11,500/ebbeeyi (→), Matooke UGX 15,000/kisero (↓3%). Lambula ebikulimibwa byo kaakano!
ussdPage.faqA1: Empeera ya network ya simu ey'obujjuvu ekozesebwa (kumpi eya bweru oba sente ntono buli kiseera). ShambaNi tesaba sente zirala kw'ogikozesa *220#.
ussdPage.faqA2: Simu yonna erina akabba eyikolera — okuva ku Nokia ey'edda okutuuka ku iPhone esinga obuggya. Tewali internet, tewali app, tewali smartphone kyetagisa. Bw'oba osobola okuyita simu, osobola okukozesa ShambaNi.
ussdPage.faqQ3: Nfuna ensasula ntya nga sina akaawunti ya banki?
ussdPage.faqA3: Osobola okufuna ensasula okuyita mu Airtel Money oba MTN Mobile Money ku simu yo. Tewetaaga akaawunti ya banki. Ensimbi ziggya mu mobile money ku simu yo.
ussdPage.faqQ4: Nsobola okukyusa embeera z'ebintu bye ndabye mu USSD?
ussdPage.faqA4: Ye! Dayila *220#, londa 'Lambula Ebikulimibwa', olwo 'Kyusa Embeera'. Osobola okukyusa embeera ku kiseera kyonna.
ussdPage.faqQ5: Ntegeera ntya nga omuntu amaze okulagira ebikulimibwa byange?
ussdPage.faqA5: Ofuna obubaka bwa SMS amangu ago omuguzi bw'amaze okutuuma ekiragiddwa. Obubaka buliko ebikwata ku muguzi, ky'ayagala, ne sente zonoona.
ussdPage.faqA6: Ddala. Tukuumira amagezi gonna g'abalimi n'obukuumi. Ennamba yo ya simu n'ebikwata ku nsasula tebitwalibwa ku baguzi. Ensasula zonna zikolebwa n'obukuumi ekibiina kyaffe.
ussdPage.ctaDesc: Dayila *220# kaakano oba oyinza okwewandiisa ku netiwerike okutuuka ku baguzi bingi okuva East Africa yonna.

aboutPage.heroTitle: Okuyamba Buli Mulimi mu Buwalabu bwa Afrika
aboutPage.heroDesc: ShambaNi eyaniriziddwa okwawula obunene wakati w'abalimi ab'awaka n'emirimu mu biriga. Twesiga buli omulimi — y'aba n'essimu enene oba ey'obujjuvu — asaanira okufuna akatale ak'amaanyi.
aboutPage.storyPara1: Entandikwa yabanga tulengera: abalimi ab'enkana mu East Africa balima ebintu ebirungi, naye bangi bakola nti bafuna abaguzi. Mu kiseera kye kimu, abakozesa mu biriga, amasomero, ne migaalo ginoonya ebyokulya ebikalu, ebirala, ebikuliddwa awaka. Okwetoloola si ku bw'omulembe — kwe kugattibwa.
aboutPage.storyPara2: ShambaNi yazimbibwa okuba ekigenderere ekyo. Naye twamanya nti okuzimba website yokka tekimala. Abalimi abangi tebafuna smartphones — balina simu ez'obujjuvu ezikola okuyita n'okusindika bubaka bye zokka. Kyetuva tuzimba sisitemu ya USSD (*220#) eriisa omulimi yenna okulambula ebikulimibwa, okukebera ebiragiddwa, n'okufuna ssimu zikozesa akabba k'okuyita zokka.
aboutPage.storyPara3: Lero, ShambaNi ekola mu Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, ne Rwanda — mu makatare 200+, mu nnimi 4, egatta abalimi n'abaguzi okuyita mu netiwerike, simu, ne USSD. Empeera yaffe ya ShambaNi 2.5% yokka, emu ku ntono mu kitundu, kubanga twesiga ensimbi zinagenda eri abo abalima emmere.
aboutPage.pullQuote: Tekinologiya inaakolere omulimi. Si omulimi okolere tekinologiya.
aboutPage.why1Desc: Sisitemu yaffe ya USSD (*220#) ekiriisa abalimi abalina simu ez'obujjuvu okulambula ebikulimibwa, okukebera ebiragiddwa, n'okufuna ssimu. Tewali internet, tewali app, tewali kyekwamisa.
aboutPage.why2Desc: Emu ku mpeera entono mu kitundu. Twesiga nti abalimi baagala okukuuma kye bakola. Ekirala kigenda mumaaso mu kulima ensuku.
aboutPage.why3Desc: Ekola mu nsi 4 n'obuyambi bwa lulimi lw'ewaka. Tuzimbira akatale ak'amanyi akagatta obulimi obwawaka n'okwetaaga mu biriga.
aboutPage.paymentsDesc: Ensasula ezironde n'obukuumi ezikolebwa ekibiina kyaffe. Enjawulo ennji ku buli nsasula.
aboutPage.paymentBank: Banki zonna z'obukulu za East Africa
aboutPage.hiw1Desc: Omulimi yenna asobola okulambula okuyita mu netiwerike oba okukuba *220# ku simu yonna — tewetaaga smartphone.
aboutPage.hiw2Desc: Amasomero, ebyobusuubuzi, n'amaka galambula ebikulimibwa ebikalu era batuume ebiragiddwa okutuusa eri abalimi.
aboutPage.hiw3Desc: Omulimi ateesa okuweerebwa. Ssula n'obukuumi okuyita mu Airtel Money, MTN Mobile Money, PayPal, oba Banki.
aboutPage.visionText: Mu 2028, ShambaNi erina ekigendererwa okugatta abalimi 10,000 okusaza East Africa, okutuusa UGX obukadde 5 mu nsasula, n'okwanguyiriza mu makatare gonna agakulu ag'obulimi mu kitundu. Tulaba ennaku ezijja we waliyo omulimi yeekubira enduulu lwa ssimu ye — we USSD, netiwerike, ne simu zigenda zikolera awamu okuzimbira akatale ak'obulimi akasinga okwawula mu Afrika.
aboutPage.founderQuote: Nazimbira ShambaNi kubanga nalaba ab'ewandife nga bakola nnyo okutunda ebikulimibwa byabwe. Jjajja wange yandiyingira okutuuka eyo okufuna omuguzi wa matooke ge, ate nga addayo nga talina kantu. Tekinologiya inaakolere kino, si kulufuula nkyamu. Ye nsonga lwaki USSD eri ku mutima gw'ebintu byonna byetukola.
aboutPage.ctaDesc: Noba oli mulimi aleete okutunda oba omuguzi anoonnya ebikulimibwa ebikalu — tuli wano okukugatta.
